pat-2026-03-16-001.name: Bootstrap Memory Under Docs
pat-2026-03-16-001.pattern: Initialize self-improvement memory under docs/ before automating deeper hooks.
pat-2026-03-16-001.problem: A product repository may not have an obvious place for agent memory artifacts.

rationale: Avoids coupling memory files to runtime source
Allows gradual adoption before hook automation

quality_rules: Prefer documentation-space storage for first-time setup
Record at least one semantic pattern, one episode, and one working-memory file
Use low-to-medium confidence for single-session patterns
